meta.resumePath: assets/docs/Jeffrey Lam Resume.pdf (referenced in prior reports; PDF not present in workspace)
meta.notes: Company careers page may render empty without JavaScript; full description obtained via Greenhouse API.

overallMatch.summary: Strong fit for Moveworks’ Solution Sales Executive (Remote, Hong Kong). The role sells ServiceNow’s Moveworks AI products with territory strategy, account-team interlock, and coaching AEs/ADRs/ACE—aligned with Jeffrey’s 15+ years in enterprise SaaS, Workday/Oracle HCM depth, and current Regional Sales Director scope. Quota history (118–143% team; 300%+ individual years) exceeds expectations. The posting explicitly asks for AI-aware selling and 5+ years specialty-solution ROI knowledge; Jeffrey exceeds tenure and can credibly build an AI narrative around enterprise HR/Finance transformation and intelligent automation. Clarify IC vs. management expectations and prepare for Now Value, agentic AI, and 30–50% travel.

granularScores.rationale: Consultative and solution selling, HR/Finance transformation, Workday and Oracle HCM map well to specialty solution wins on the ServiceNow + Moveworks AI stack. Posting emphasizes AI in workflows and ROI of specialty solutions—strengthen with explicit AI/customer examples (Workday ecosystem, automation). Gaps: Moveworks product specifics and Now Value language to be learned; not different from typical enterprise ramp.

Far above 5+ years specialty ROI and AE-style quota roles; full-cycle enterprise sales; competitive displacement (Oracle/SAP). Territory planning and executive engagement fit account planning and ‘coach the field’ aspects of the role.
Bachelor of Accounting (Curtin) is typical for enterprise sales; no advanced degree required in posting; experience carries weight.
Role is Remote, Hong Kong; candidate is Hong Kong–based with Greater China focus—strong alignment.
Multiple vendors (Infor, Oracle, Microsoft, Workday), IC to RSD progression, and complex enterprise cycles support adaptability to Moveworks post–ServiceNow acquisition and evolving AI GTM.
Agentic AI and ServiceNow scale offer strong growth; stepping from RSD to IC may need a clear story unless the role allows hybrid leadership expectations—confirm with recruiter.
Posting cites competitive salary, equity, and commission/bonus typical for enterprise SaaS; prior band at Workday RSD in Hong Kong likely comparable—confirm OTE and equity with recruiter.

jobRequirements.requirement: AI in work processes, decision-making, or problem-solving
jobRequirements.evidence: Prepare narrative tying HR/Finance digital transformation, automation, and intelligent workflows; prior analyses did not list AI tools explicitly—address in interviews.

jobRequirements.requirement: 5+ years knowledge on ROI of specialty solutions to lead solution win
jobRequirements.evidence: 15+ years enterprise software sales; consistent over-quota performance; solution selling and ROI conversations in HR/Finance transformations.

jobRequirements.requirement: Experience as an AE or alternative sales/customer service role
jobRequirements.evidence: Account Executive and Regional Sales Director roles at Workday; prior AE/enterprise roles at Oracle, Microsoft, Infor.
Full-cycle enterprise sales, account planning, multi-stakeholder deals.
Greater China enterprise coverage implies travel; confirm willingness and passport/logistics.

jobRequirements.requirement: Territory strategy, account planning input to AE, Now Value alignment
jobRequirements.evidence: RSD experience; territory and account coverage in North Asia context from related ServiceNow analysis.

jobRequirements.requirement: Interlock with SC/Specialist SC; coach AEs, ADRs, ACE
jobRequirements.evidence: Management and field coaching as RSD; prepare examples of enabling sales teams on specialty solutions.

strengths: Quota attainment and enterprise SaaS tenure significantly above posting minimums.
Workday and Oracle HCM expertise aligns with ServiceNow/Moveworks enterprise buyer and competitive context.
Hong Kong base and languages (English, Cantonese, Mandarin) fit Remote HK and regional account work.
Displacement and complex-cycle experience relevant to specialty solution wins.
RSD background supports coaching AEs/ADRs and territory planning described in the role.

gapsAndRecommendations.gap: Moveworks product and Reasoning Engine specifics
gapsAndRecommendations.recommendation: Study Moveworks agentic AI positioning, Service Management integration, and 1–2 customer stories from Moveworks site and news.
Add AI-assisted selling, automation, or analytics used in deals (e.g., CRM AI, Workday/ partner AI) where accurate.
Prepare concise rationale if moving to IC for Moveworks AI focus and territory depth.

interviewPrepFocus: Now Value and ROI storytelling for specialty AI on ServiceNow.
How you would partner with AEs, SCs, and partners on a Moveworks AI opportunity in a named account.
2–3 stories on digital transformation, automation, and measurable outcomes (tie to AI where honest).
Clarify travel, remote work expectations, and territory scope for Hong Kong / Greater China.
